requirement_topic.en: Iranian Authorized Importer / Local Agent Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 伊朗授权进口商/当地代理要求
requirement_topic.zht: 伊朗授權進口商/當地代理要求

summary.en: All wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported into Iran must be handled by a locally registered Iranian company acting as the authorized importer or local agent. The Iranian importer is responsible for: (1) submitting the CRA type approval application on behalf of the foreign manufacturer; (2) managing ISIRI product conformity filings; (3) applying Persian/Farsi labelling and preparing compliant documentation; (4) customs clearance under the importer's commercial registration; and (5) being the point of contact for ISIRI market surveillance and CRA regulatory inquiries. Direct import by the foreign manufacturer without an Iranian registered entity is not permitted. The importer must hold valid commercial registration and, for telecom equipment, may need specific trade licences from MCIT/MOC.
summary.zh: 所有进口至伊朗的无线及电信终端设备须由在伊朗本地注册的公司作为授权进口商或当地代理进行处理。伊朗进口商负责：(1) 代表外国制造商提交CRA型号认证申请；(2) 处理ISIRI产品合规备案；(3) 贴附波斯语/法尔西语标签并准备合规文档；(4) 在进口商商业登记下办理海关清关；以及(5) 担任ISIRI市场监管及CRA监管查询的联络点。未经伊朗注册实体，外国制造商不得直接进口。进口商须持有有效的商业登记，对于电信设备，可能还须持有MCIT/MOC颁发的特定贸易许可证。
summary.zht: 所有進口至伊朗的無線及電信終端設備須由在伊朗本地註冊的公司作為授權進口商或當地代理進行處理。伊朗進口商負責：(1) 代表外國製造商提交CRA型號認證申請；(2) 處理ISIRI產品合規備案；(3) 貼附波斯語/法爾西語標籤並準備合規文檔；(4) 在進口商商業登記下辦理海關清關；以及(5) 擔任ISIRI市場監管及CRA監管查詢的聯絡點。未經伊朗註冊實體，外國製造商不得直接進口。進口商須持有有效的商業登記，對於電信設備，可能還須持有MCIT/MOC頒發的特定貿易許可證。

standards_or_laws: Iran Foreign Trade Regulations (Ministry of Industry, Mine and Trade)
CRA Type Approval Regulations — importer/agent submission requirements
ISIRI product registration and market surveillance regulations
Iran Customs Law (import through registered commercial entity)
MCIT / MOC telecom equipment import licensing requirements

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting to overseas markets typically appoint a local importer or distributor in the destination country for customs, regulatory filings, and after-sales. For domestic China sales, the manufacturer itself handles CCC/SRRC filings directly. There is no equivalent requirement for a foreign-registered agent for Chinese domestic distribution.
summary.zh: 中国制造商向海外市场出口时，通常在目的国指定当地进口商或分销商负责海关、监管备案及售后事务。在中国国内销售时，制造商自行直接处理CCC/SRRC申请。中国国内分销不存在须有外国注册代理的等效要求。
summary.zht: 中國製造商向海外市場出口時，通常在目的國指定當地進口商或分銷商負責海關、監管備案及售後事務。在中國國內銷售時，製造商自行直接處理CCC/SRRC申請。中國國內分銷不存在須有外國註冊代理的等效要求。

standards_or_laws: China CCC: manufacturer or its authorised representative files directly (no mandatory in-country agent for export)
General export trade: Chinese manufacturer appoints overseas distributor/importer per commercial agreement

gap.en: Iran requires a locally registered Iranian company as mandatory intermediary for import, CRA filings, and ISIRI compliance. The foreign (Chinese) manufacturer cannot act as its own importer. Establishing or identifying a qualified Iranian partner is a prerequisite before any product can legally enter the Iranian market. Note: under current US/EU/UN sanctions, commercial banking and payments with Iranian entities are severely restricted, adding a practical financial-channel gap on top of the regulatory requirement. See also: wirir-sanctions-trade-001.
gap.zh: 伊朗要求本地注册的伊朗公司作为进口、CRA申请及ISIRI合规的强制中间方。外国（中国）制造商不得自行充当进口商。在任何产品合法进入伊朗市场之前，必须先建立或确定合格的伊朗合作伙伴。注意：在当前美国/欧盟/联合国制裁下，与伊朗实体的商业银行和支付往来受到严格限制，在监管要求之外还存在实际金融渠道差距。另见：wirir-sanctions-trade-001。
gap.zht: 伊朗要求本地註冊的伊朗公司作為進口、CRA申請及ISIRI合規的強制中間方。外國（中國）製造商不得自行充當進口商。在任何產品合法進入伊朗市場之前，必須先建立或確定合格的伊朗合作夥伴。注意：在當前美國/歐盟/聯合國制裁下，與伊朗實體的商業銀行和支付往來受到嚴格限制，在監管要求之外還存在實際金融渠道差距。另見：wirir-sanctions-trade-001。

source.publisher: CRA — Communications Regulatory Authority of Iran

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally registered Iranian company acting as authorized importer or agent is mandatory for importing wireless and telecom terminal equipment into Iran and submitting CRA type approval applications. Direct import by a foreign manufacturer is not permitted. Sanctions-related restrictions on payments and banking with Iranian entities create significant additional practical barriers beyond the formal regulatory requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在伊朗进口无线及电信终端设备并提交CRA型号认证申请时，须强制委托本地注册的伊朗公司担任授权进口商或代理。外国制造商不得直接进口。与伊朗实体相关的制裁限制（支付及银行）在正式监管要求之外造成了重大额外实际障碍。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在伊朗進口無線及電信終端設備並提交CRA型號認證申請時，須強制委託本地註冊的伊朗公司擔任授權進口商或代理。外國製造商不得直接進口。與伊朗實體相關的制裁限制（支付及銀行）在正式監管要求之外造成了重大額外實際障礙。
